# axm_blueprint (List Resource)

Searches for Apple Business Manager Blueprints.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "axm_blueprint" "engineering_blueprints" {
    provider = axm

    config {
        # Match Blueprints that contain "Engineering" in the name
        name_contains = "Engineering"
    }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) Filters results by a case-insensitive exact Blueprint name.
- `name_contains` (String) Filters results by a case-insensitive substring match on the Blueprint name.
- `status` (String) Filters results by a case-insensitive Blueprint status.
